product.name: 3inch Lift Shocks for Chevy Silverado 2500 3500HD GMC Sierra 2500 3500HD 2001-2010, Zinc Plated Coating, 4 Pieces Pack
features: WILDFIX Chevy 2500 3500HD 3 inch lifted front shock's collapsed length is 11.4 inch / 290.00mm, extended length is 16.9 inch / 430.00mm.
WILDFIX Chevy 2500 3500HD 3 inch lifted rear shock's collapsed length is 16.5 inch / 419.00mm, extended length is 27.8 inch / 706.00mm.
Silverado 2500 3500 Shock With Big Tube Body Design Helps Dissipate Heat More Efficiently, The Progressive Engagement Valving Have Been Engineered To Provide Extreme Off-road Performance.
Zinc plated shock body, gas charged & twin tube designed shocks for Sierra 2500 3500HD, longer life spam and high performance on road daily driving or off road rock climbing.
WILDFIX offer 3 years warranty from date of purchase.
